ground_truth.title: Animal & Insect Control | Pest Control
ground_truth.main_content: Insect & Pest Control - Shop by pest type including mosquitoes, flies, ants, wasps, roaches, bed bugs, fleas & ticks, fruit flies, termites, grubs, beetles, spiders, mice, squirrels, rats, moles, rabbits, and gophers. Find insect traps and repellants, animal and rodent control solutions, animal traps, pest killers, natural pest control, bug zappers, fly swatters, bird repellants, and deer repellants. Shop outdoor pest control brands like Spectracide, Black Flag, Garden Tech Sevin, Sevin, OFF!, BioAdvanced, Terro, Tomcat, Ortho, Hot Shot, Raid, and JT Eaton. Find no-kill animal control solutions including humane traps from Havahart. Browse natural pest repellents created with essential oils and predatory animal secretions. Shop bird deterrent options like bird spikes, scared-eye diverters, repelling balloons, and repellent gel from Bird-B-Gone. Rodent control includes mole traps, rodent control systems, spring-loaded and glue-based mouse traps, and electronic options from Tomcat. Insect control products include torches, bug zappers, insect traps, spray repellents, fly swatters, and citronella candles from Raid and Cutter. For serious infestations, browse insecticides from Spectracide and BioAdvanced, including liquid pesticides with essential oils and granular insecticides for creating outdoor boundaries against ants, fleas, and other insects. Shop online for quick shipping or free in-store pickup at Ace Hardware.
with: Shop animal and pest control like traps, insecticides, deterrents and more.
Find no-kill, catch-and-release animal traps for a humane alternative.
Rodents are plentiful, and any number of moles, gophers, squirrels, rats, and mice can cause serious damage to your property.
Prevention is the best form of pest control against an insect invasion.
Ace has your pest control under control with a wide range of mechanical, chemical, and electronic products.
